name.full: AI Implement Toolkit for M365 Copilot Cowork

description.short: M365 Copilot Cowork cost governance + FinOps insight reports.
description.full: A cost-governance toolkit for M365 Copilot Cowork. (1) m365-cost-advisor routes each task to the cheapest capable option: the licence-included Copilot Chat + Work IQ (mail, Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive) and built-in Office apps + Copilot cost nothing per run, while a metered Cowork run burns credits — cheap lookups get a 'use Chat next time' nudge, expensive but divertible artifacts get a pre-tip to use PowerPoint/Excel/Word + Copilot first, and tasks only Cowork can do proceed untouched. (2) ai-finops-report turns the exported Neptune/Cowork consumption CSV logs into insight deliverables — a zh-TW Word narrative, a Power BI-style Excel dashboard, and an interactive HTML dashboard with slicers — centred on a quantified cost-optimization action plan (cap ungoverned spend, reclaim idle licences, break concentration risk, right-size limits). Prevent spend at task time; analyze and optimize spend after the fact.
